name: Asami Tanaka
title: Shintaku

abilities.name: A Mother's Love
abilities.text: When another friendly Oni model within 8" is dealt damage from an action, it may reduce that damage by up to 2, to a minimum of 0. If it does so, this model is dealt irreducible damage equal to the amount reduced.

abilities.name: Shuddering Rift
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model is dealt damage, it may remove a friendly Rift marker within 2". If it does so, reduce the damage dealt to this model by 1 and deal 1 damage to an enemy model within 8".

actions.name: Spiritual Invasion
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Hunt Through Time and Space: Another ally within 8" of the target may place into base contact with the target and then declare an action.

actions.name: Into the Beyond
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Make a Rift marker within range. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Corrosive Touch
triggers.text: Remove any one non-Scheme marker within 2" of the made marker.

actions.name: Oni's Strength
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an ally within 1" of a Rift marker.

triggers.name: Dark Remedy
triggers.text: This model or the target heals 2.

triggers.name: Soulfire
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)3" must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

actions.name: Sinister Revelation
actions.effects: Summon a unique Oni within range. The summoned model gains a Flicker token.

extraction_notes: Sinister Revelation has TN value of '*' which typically means variable or special condition; represented as null
